title: The Best Fitness Studio Workouts On Demand | Xponential+
meta_description: From boxing to barre and everything in between. Reach your goals from anywhere with XPLUS with the best in-studio workouts live and on-demand.

#  The world's best boutique  
fitness classes — on demand. 
From boxing to barre and everything in between —A healthier, better looking, and more successful you starts with a 7 day free trial. 
[ Get Started ](https://members.xponential.plus/en-US/account/offers-exclusive)
## Thousands of classes from the best brands in boutique fitness

## Bring the best studio fitness brands to your living room
With daily live classes and a global community streaming alongside you, you'll never train alone.
[ Start Your Free Trial ](https://members.xponential.plus/en-US/account/offers-exclusive)
![XPLUS app streaming](https://www.xponential.plus/hubfs/XPLUS-Live-iPad-min.jpg)
